pi_items.source: Task specification - arbitrary but correctly specified in task.json
Task specification - correctly specified in task.json
Valid Magento store view code format, verified in export_result.sh queries

Valid ISO 639-1 (fr) + ISO 3166 (FR) locale code for French (France). Confirmed as valid Magento locale in Magento documentation and language packs. Referenced in Mageplaza French Language Pack (fr_FR) and Magento 2 locale configuration docs.
Task specification - correctly specified in task.json
Valid Magento store view code format, verified in export_result.sh queries
Valid ISO 639-1 (de) + ISO 3166 (DE) locale code for German (Germany). Confirmed as valid Magento locale in Magento 2 configuration and language documentation.
Valid ISO 4217 currency code for Euro (currency code 978). Confirmed in ISO 4217 standard and banking documentation.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Magento store group named 'NestWell Europe' with two store views: 'French Store View' (code: nestwell_fr, locale: fr_FR) and 'German Store View' (code: nestwell_de, locale: de_DE). The French locale fr_FR is a valid ISO 639-1/ISO 3166 code for French (France). The German locale de_DE is a valid ISO 639-1/ISO 3166 code for German (Germany). EUR is a valid ISO 4217 currency code for the Euro. All metadata values match valid international standards and Magento configuration formats.
